title: tgscan pipeline parameters - params.input input.csv
description: IN DEV - Schema for validating gffctx pipeline parameters

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

genome.errorMessage: Target genome file, FASTA formmat. Additionally, if the file is compressed, it must end with .gz

hmm.errorMessage: File containing the HMM profiles (HMMER format). Multiple profiles can be concatenated in a single file, but the file must be uncompressed and end with .hmm
